upasargachandrika.example_text: 'antarBinnaM Bramati hfdayaM vihvalatyaNgamaNgam' (mAlatI0 520) vihvalati vicalati vepate
'kzaRamAtrasaKIM (srajam) sujAtayoH stanayostAmavalokya vihvalA' (raGu0 837) vihvalA paravaSeti malliH
'saMjYAM nopalaBe sUta mano vihvalatIva me' (BA0 Adi0 1218) BramatItyarTaH
'vittavyADavikAravihvalagirAM nAmApi na SrUyate' (Bartf0 359) vihvalA klizwA dUnA
'pari hvAlaM vAcaM vadati' (Sa 0 brA0 32227) sKalantyA vAcA bravItItyarTaH
